details.note: Agent Context provider with ContextNode/ContextEdge/AgentContext types, createStore demo data (13 nodes, 16 edges), toggle/focusNode/clearFocus/addNode/addEdge mutations, createSimpleContext pattern

SVG-based interactive force layout graph: 120-iteration repulsion+attraction+centering simulation, circle nodes colored by type, lines with strength-based strokeWidth, zoom via wheel, pan via drag, hover dims non-connected nodes, focus shows pulse ring animation
Overlay showing 5 node types with colored SVG circles (File=blue, Directory=purple, Pattern=green, Concept=amber, Dependency=red)
Container panel: fixed right 400px panel with header (Agent Context + N files count), graph body, legend footer area, backdrop, close button
242 lines of CSS: SVG container, node/edge transitions, pulse ring keyframes, legend positioning, panel slide-in/out, backdrop fade, theme tokens, light mode, motion reduce
Barrel exports: AgentContextGraph, ContextGraph, ContextLegend, useAgentContext, AgentContextProvider, types
